summary: Iteration 221 - Sovereign Mantras Library, Wisdom Prescriptions, and Orbital Transition Portal Testing Complete. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: OrbitalTransitionPortal renders on all 3 orbital pages (Botany, Trade, Codex) with 5 destinations (Botany, Trade, Codex, Hub, Stars). Wormhole transitions work correctly between orbital pages. Codex deep-dive recursion working with back navigation. All orbital pages show center sun, orbiting planets, and CosmicSparkline overlay.
critical_code_review_comments: mantras_sovereign.py: MANTRAS_LIBRARY has 43 entries across 4 categories (ancient_mantra: 10, phonic_resonance: 10, affirmation: 15, wisdom_prescription: 8)
mantras_sovereign.py: Tier-gating correctly implemented - locked entries have text truncated to 12 chars + '...'
mantras_sovereign.py: Wisdom prescription endpoint computes hexagram, finds matching prescription by hexagram_range, affirmation by dominant_element, resonance by solfeggio_hz
SensoryContext.js: 4-tier audio system implemented (standard, apprentice, artisan, sovereign) with MASTERY_TO_AUDIO mapping
SensoryContext.js: Convolution reverb engine generates synthetic temple impulse response with early reflections and modal resonances
SensoryContext.js: playConfirmation() plays pitch-shifted tone with harmonic overtones (Apprentice+) and sub-harmonic resonance (Sovereign)
SensoryContext.js: playSingingBowl() synthesizes singing bowl with inharmonic partials (2.71, 4.16, 5.43 ratios) and beating effect
OrbitalTransitionPortal.js: 5 destinations defined (Botany, Trade, Codex, Hub, Stars) with correct paths and colors
OrbitalTransitionPortal.js: Wormhole animation shows 5 expanding rings with destination label during transition
OrbitalTransitionPortal.js: Current page highlighted with color accent and expanded label
OrbitalHubBase.js: Gravitational pull zones implemented via computeGravitationalDamping() - quadratic easing (0.05 at surface, 1.0 at pullRadius)
OrbitalHubBase.js: Confirmation chime plays on node click via handleConfirm() - frequency mapped by semitone from node index
OrbitalHubBase.js: OrbitalTransitionPortal integrated at bottom of all orbital pages
BotanyOrbital.js: Generates planets from element groups, garden, resonance, balance, identify, and alchemy nodes
TradeCircleOrbital.js: Generates category planets from listings data + stats/escrow/forge/genesis/karma nodes
CodexOrbital.js: Deep-dive recursion uses diveStack array - clicking section with subPlanets pushes to stack
MissionControl.js: Has all 3 orbital links (Botany Orbital, Trade Orbital, Codex Orbital) in actions array
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 221 verified: (1) GET /api/mantras/sovereign-library returns 43 entries across 4 categories (ancient_mantra: 10, phonic_resonance: 10, affirmation: 15, wisdom_prescription: 8). (2) Archivist tier has 33 unlocked entries. (3) Locked entries have text truncated to 12 chars + '...'. (4) GET /api/mantras/wisdom-prescription returns hexagram, dominant_element, solfeggio_hz, prescription, affirmation, and resonance. (5) OrbitalTransitionPortal renders on all 3 orbital pages with 5 destinations. (6) Wormhole transition shows expanding rings and destination label. (7) Current page highlighted in portal nav. (8) Codex deep-dive recursion works with back navigation. (9) Gravitational pull zones slow orbit when cursor near nodes. (10) Confirmation chime plays on node click with pitch-shifted tone. (11) 4-tier audio system maps mastery tiers to audio tiers. (12) Convolution reverb generates temple impulse response. (13) Singing bowl synthesis with inharmonic partials. (14) MissionControl has all 3 orbital links.

sovereign_library_endpoint.details: GET /api/mantras/sovereign-library returns 200 with 43 entries, 4 categories, tier-gating

sovereign_library_tier_gating.details: Archivist tier has 33 unlocked entries, locked entries truncated to 12 chars + '...'

wisdom_prescription_endpoint.details: GET /api/mantras/wisdom-prescription returns hexagram, dominant_element, solfeggio_hz, prescription, affirmation, resonance

wisdom_prescription_hexagram.details: Returns hexagram number (1-64), chinese character, and name

wisdom_prescription_resonance.details: Returns phonic resonance matching solfeggio frequency

orbital_transition_portal.details: Renders on all 3 orbital pages with 5 destinations (Botany, Trade, Codex, Hub, Stars)

wormhole_transition.details: Clicking destination triggers wormhole zoom with expanding rings and destination label

portal_current_page_highlight.details: Current page highlighted with color accent and expanded label

botany_orbital.details: Renders with element/garden/resonance/balance/identify/alchemy planets, Five Elements Wheel overlay

trade_orbital.details: Renders with category planets from listings + stats/escrow/forge/genesis/karma nodes

codex_orbital.details: Renders with section planets, tier indicator, deep-dive recursion

codex_deep_dive_recursion.details: Clicking section with subPlanets triggers fly-in, section becomes sun, back button appears

gravitational_pull_zones.details: Implemented in OrbitalHubBase.js - orbit slows when cursor near nodes (quadratic damping)

confirmation_chime.details: Implemented in OrbitalHubBase.js - plays pitch-shifted tone on node click via SensoryContext

four_tier_audio_system.details: SensoryContext.js has AUDIO_TIERS (standard, apprentice, artisan, sovereign) with MASTERY_TO_AUDIO mapping

convolution_reverb.details: getConvolver() generates synthetic temple impulse response with early reflections and modal resonances

singing_bowl_synthesis.details: playSingingBowl() synthesizes with inharmonic partials (2.71, 4.16, 5.43) and beating effect

mission_control_orbital_links.details: MissionControl.js has Botany Orbital, Trade Orbital, Codex Orbital in actions array
